name: @prana/pool-coordinator
description: PRANA pool coordinator skeleton (SS2 / backlog XX18 + PR8 multi-coin). The open-source 'front end' anyone can run that collects verified shares from workers, batches them per epoch, and settles them into the ONE on-chain UnifiedSharesLedger (the Hive/BLURT-front-end + P2Pool model: many coordinators, one ledger). SKELETON — real stratum + on-chain send are stubbed; share collection, validation, dedup, epoch batching and the settle-tx shape are real and unit-testable.
author: Van Kush Family Research Institute (VKFRI)
